feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: how to update startdate and duedate fields in production order
entry.content: How do I update the startdate and duedate fields in the production order? Which templates should I use and how should I fill them out?

entry.title: how to see quantity per warehouse in list of items
entry.content:
Dear all,

In SAP B1 when creating a sales order, we have a row called 'In Stock'. But certain items we have in 2 different warehouses. How can I see change the view of this list, so I can see:

- Total stock

- Stock WHS 1

- Stock WHS 2 etc, etc,

I hope you can help me.

Regards, Mark

entry.title: ORSC in validation link for a UDF
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to validate a UDF with a link to ORSC (Resource Master Data), but this object is not appearing in the system objects list.

I'm using SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA (10.00.150) FP 2102

Is there a procedure to update the list?

Thanks,

Arão

entry.title: Unable to add User for Logging into the Authentication Service in SAP B1 10.0 FP2402 MSSQL Version
entry.content:
Hi  Team,

Unable to add User for Logging into the Authentication Service in SAP B1 10.0 FP2402 MSSQL Version.

I have tried using this link: Adding a User for Logging into the Authentication Service | SAP Help Portal

Please help me to resolve.

Regards,

Surya

entry.title: Inventory Posting List hang even in SAP integration windows Server
entry.content:
Hi All

How to apply SAP Note 3229219 on Hana Database version 10 for 10000 items and dates range 16 days?

3229219 - KBA 3483807 - It takes a long time to display inventory posting list by items form

SAP Business One Notes, Version: 6, Released On: 08.08.2024
 
 
Kedalene Chong

entry.title: SAP Business One Boleto files
entry.content:
Hi All

What are these SAP Business One Boleto files?  Can they be deleted?

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Error Sync PriceDiscountList in CCO
entry.content:
Hi Community,

i try to sync the PriceDiscountList in Customer Checkout. I got an Error Message in the Log-File "During synchronization a new object was found through a relationship that was not marked cascade". 

Can anyone help me to find out what the problem is?

The Warning Button in CCO is empty and with no further information.

BackEndSystem SapBusinessOne - SQL - Customer Checkout Version 2.0 FP20 PL00

Thank you very much - Best Regards Daniela

entry.title: Bloquear campo en documentos de marketing ordenes de venta
entry.content:
Buenas Tardes

Soy nuevo en SAP y necesitaría de su apoyo, ya que tengo la necesidad de que en las líneas de marketing del proceso de ordenes de venta se necesita bloquear un campo UDF personalizado. Se necesita que sea por transaction. Este campo es tipo fecha.

entry.title: Web Client not able to open attachment and attach document
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Customer is using SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.191) FP 2202 (64-bit)

On webclient page, when try to open pdf attachment, it give error as below;

 

When i try to upload document via webportal, it keep loading endless.

This is the attachment folder and i have mount this folder as below;

 

 

What else do i miss?

Thank you.

Best regards,

Tan Su Hsiang

entry.title: Customer Business Partner Change Log History Query
entry.content:
Hi All

Please help to improve my Query to show SAP User Code and Name who Create Customer BP and SAP User and Name who Updated BP, thanks!

SELECT T0.[CardCode], T0.[CardName], T2.[GroupName],T3.[PymntGroup], T0.[CreateDate], T1.[UpdateDate], T1.[CardName], T1.[GroupCode], T1.[GroupNum], T1.[Currency], T1.[CntctPrsn], T1.[Building], T1.[Cellular], T1.[VatGroup], T1.[BankCode], T1.[BankCtlKey], T1.[DebPayAcct], T0.[OwnerCode], T1.[RepName], T1.[IsDomestic], T1.[IsResident], T1.[OwnerCode], T1.[MandateID], T1.[SignDate], T1.[RepFName], T1.[RepSName] FROM [dbo].[OCRD] T0 INNER JOIN [dbo].[ACRD] T1 ON T0.[CardCode] = T1.[CardCode] INNER JOIN OCRG T2 ON T0.[GroupCode] = T2.[GroupCode] INNER JOIN OCTG T3 ON T0.[GroupNum] = T3.[GroupNum] WHERE T0.[CardCode] =[%0]

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Open documents exclude all orders with date 01-01 (all years)
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working on a query of the open customer orders.

I want this query not to show the orders with date DAY 01 MONTH 01. So all orders from January 1 (every year) should not be visible.

I have tried the options below. These work, but do not show all orders that start with DAY 01. So all orders from February 1, March 1, and April 1 are not visible. I only want all the orders from 1 january not to be visible.

 

 

SELECT 
T0.[DocNum],
T1.[Quantity],
T1.[ItemCode],
T1.[Dscription],
T0.[DocDate],
T0.[CardCode], 
T0.[CardName]

FROM 
ORDR T0  
INNER JOIN RDR1 T1 ON T0.[DocEntry] = T1.[DocEntry] 

WHERE 
T0.[CardCode] =[%0] AND
T0.[DocDate] <=[%1] AND
T1.[LineStatus]= 'O' AND
month(T0.[DocDate]) <> '1' and day(T0.[DocDate]) <> '1'

ORDER BY
T1.[ItemCode]

 

 

 

 

 

SELECT 
T0.[DocNum],
T1.[Quantity],
T1.[ItemCode],
T1.[Dscription],
T0.[DocDate],
T0.[CardCode], 
T0.[CardName]

FROM 
ORDR T0  
INNER JOIN RDR1 T1 ON T0.[DocEntry] = T1.[DocEntry] 

WHERE 
T0.[CardCode] =[%0] AND
T0.[DocDate] <=[%1] AND
T1.[LineStatus]= 'O' AND
Datepart(DD,T0.DocDate) <> '01' And DatePart(MM,T0.DocDate) <> '01'

ORDER BY
T1.[ItemCode]

entry.title: UDF Setup history item list BP ordered
entry.content:
Dear all,

If we make a sales order in SAP B1, I would like to see, by pressing SHIFT+F2 to see what the BP bought in the last 180 days and the quantities.

What query should I make, to see the list?

Please advise.

Thanks in advance

Regards Mark

entry.title: SAP B1 10.0 data archive wizard failed
entry.content:
Dear All,

I've just tried to archive the SAP B1 on MSSQL by using sap data archive wizard. But the archive is failed. Here is the screen shot of the message:

for #2, I have performed after this warning log appears. For the rest, I can't find out how to know the unbalance P&L accounts quickly. How to solve this warning log ?

Thanks in advance,

Jimmy Michael

(SAP SCN member since 2007)

entry.title: Process of ByProduct product use into Production Module SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

How to setup OR use of ByProduct items into Production Module SAP Business One?

Where to define it?

Production Order, SAP business one, SBO, B1

Regards,

nikunj

entry.title: Sales Order to Production Order link query SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Need a query related sales order to production order link.

SAP Business One

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Use of Sequence into SAP B1 / SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi all,

What is the use of "Sequence" in SAP B1 OR SAP Business One?  Why it is showing into Marketing document? 

What are the benefits of Sequence used into document? 

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: PO to show next price break quantity on item from SPP2 shows 'Invalid numeric value' error if > 1k
entry.content:
Hi All,

I've created a UDF on marketing document rows to show the next quantity price break on each item if it exists.
This works as needed up until the next quantity price break is 1,000 or more.
How can I amend the FMS too ignore the comma in the number format?

 

SELECT T0.[Amount] FROM SPP2 T0 WHERE T0.[ItemCode] =$[$38.1.0] and  T0.[CardCode] =$[$4.1.0] and  T0.[Amount] > $[$38.11.number]

 

 Screenshot showing the Volume Discounts format of the price breaks and the PO with the error.

Any advice is appriceated. Thanks.

EDIT;
I've just realised it is the UDF that is causing this, it is set as numeric type.
Manually typing 1000 is fine, while entering 1,000 shows same error.
Do I then need to set a new UDF as Alphanumeric or can the FMS be changed to remove the comma before?

entry.title: Web client does not display standard functions in Analysis data source
entry.content:
Hello there.

I have encountered an issue when configuring an Analysis view in the SAP Business One WEB client.

When accessing the definition of an analysis panel in the Web client, the list of data sources or sources is limited.

If I have many enabled queries or user tables, the list is displayed before the standard functions, so these functions do not appear to select and build system function views.

Can it be configured so that the user tables do not appear?

Can it be configured to show or not to show in this list?

It seems that it is a bug or error in the web client

In this case I only see the first 2...
Business Partners and Activities

In Spanish language

Al acceder en el cliente Web a la definición de un panel de análisis, la lista de origen o fuente de datos, está limitada.

Si tengo muchas consultas habilitadas o tablas de usuario, las lista antes que las funciones estándard, entonces no aparecen estas funciones para seleccionar y construir vistas de funciones del sistema.

¿Se puede configurar que no aparezcan las tablas de usuario?

¿Se puede configurar que ver o no ver en esta lista?

Tiene pinta que es un bug o error del cliente web

entry.title: Which report consider for Inventory valuation SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Which report exactly consider OR give a final outcome to total stock quantity and total stock valuation into SAP Business One. 

Here,  Inventory Audit Report and Inventory in Warehouse Report (Detailed) gives two values. 

Also need to understanding on Inventory Audit Report V/S Inventory in Warehouse Report (Detailed) V/S Inventory Aging Report.

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: What is the size limitation for Alerts in SAP B1 V10
entry.content: What is the size limitation for alerts in SAP B1 V10 and where can we find documentation on the size limits?
